title: T-051 — UI: TEC-060 Routing List + TEC-061 Routing Edit modal
prompt: Build routing list at /technical/routings (TEC-060) and the routing step add/edit modal (TEC-061). Match `routings_screen` design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:4-34 and `routing_step_add_modal` design/Monopilot Design System/technical/modals.jsx:271-304. Drag-sort op order via dnd-kit. Uses T-022 endpoints. RED tests/ui/tec-060-routing.test.tsx. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/ui/tec-060-routing.test.tsx`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Routing list + add/edit modal with drag-sort and manufacturing_operation_name picker.
pipeline_inputs.details: manufacturing_operation_name picker fed from reference_tables.manufacturing_operations. Drag-sort recomputes op_no contiguous (V-TEC-60).
acceptance_criteria: Given the screen and modal render, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:4-34 and design/Monopilot Design System/technical/modals.jsx:271-304, then list columns, modal field set, and Cancel/Confirm button order match — structural + visual + interaction parity verified by RTL.
Given user reorders ops via drag, when saved, then op_no resequenced contiguous starting at 1.
Given op without line_id and machine_id, when Save clicked, then validation error V-TEC-61.
test_strategy: RED tests for parity + drag-sort + validation.
